title: Phase 1/Phase 2 validation separation for space_set atomicity
description: Validating all member patch paths/values before writing any of them (Phase 1 / Phase 2 split) is the correct approach for RFC 8620 §7.1. The previous code wrote name/description then checked member paths — a combined patch with valid name + invalid role would write the name and return notUpdated, a clear atomicity violation. A contributor might suggest "simplify by validating inline with writes" — that breaks atomicity and should be rejected. The existence check inside update_space_fully (in the same SQLite transaction) closes the second gap: a member-only patch on a nonexistent space would previously create orphaned space_member rows and return Ok(true).
